selectInfoParent: Parents have always strived to educate their children, because this is the basis of evolution. Assigning tasks to children is a key element of education. The more assignments, the more experience and knowledge they gain. Experience gained through practice and assignments promotes the development of critical thinking and problem-solving skills. It also helps children better understand the world around them, preparing them for future challenges. Education through experience creates comprehensively developed and independent individuals
selectInfoKid: If a child wants to become smart, he needs to actively ask questions to his parents about how to perform various activities and solve problems. He should strive to receive more complex tasks that will help him develop and improve. Parents, in turn, are obliged to support and encourage the child’s desire for knowledge. They should create conditions for his learning, help him learn new skills and share experience. This includes not only learning practical skills, but also developing the ability to earn money and gain life experience. This approach will help the child become more independent and successful in the future
name: Name
selectDescription: Parents assign tasks, inspect their completion, and reward their children accordingly. This fosters diligence, integrity, responsibility, and a sense of pride in their daily lives, instilling a sense of accomplishment in parenting

multiTaskDescription:
Allows you to create tasks repeated daily (e.g. brushing teeth, cleaning, homework).
This way the child sees that the task returns every day, and the parent can easily check if it has been completed.
singleTaskDescription:
Allows you to create one-time tasks (e.g. buying a gift, helping in the garden, extra exercise).
This way the child sees a clearly defined task to complete, and the parent can quickly check if it has been done.

priceStatusDescription:
This is the suggested reward for the task.
You can
✔ accept it
or
💬 suggest a change and send it to your parent.
🤝 Try to reach a mutual decision together
inProgressStatusDescription:
Before you click, check if the task is truly well done.
Did you do everything that was needed ✔
and according to the requirements?
If so — click 🚀
⏳ Now it's time for review and your reward
weakResult: Your work received a lower grade today, but treat it like training – next time you'll step onto the field with new knowledge and give it your all! Don't give up, you have great potential within you.
goodResult: Your work was rated fantastically! It was a true showcase of your skills – you crossed the finish line like a champion. It's clear you put a lot of heart and effort into this. You're on a great path, keep it up!
middleResult: Your work is solid and shows you know the basics, but I know you're capable of even more! It's a 'halfway there' result – you have a good foundation, now just add a few more details to jump onto the top podium next time.
completeStatusDescription: Mission accomplished! The task is settled and closed. You can breathe a sigh of relief and move on to something completely different – you’ve earned a little break before the next start!
whyYouNeedDreams:
Go for what truly brings you joy ✨ — not everything has to be another thing. Sometimes time with loved ones, laughter, and memories are worth more than any gadgets.
Keep it simple and care about the world 🌱 — then your wishes will mean even more
canSeeAndAddToTasks: {} can see and add this wish to your tasks
whyYouNeedEarn: Saving gives you freedom 🕊️ and the means to reach your dream goals 🎯. With a safety net 🛡️, you avoid stress, and small amounts turn into a real fortune 💰 over time! You learn patience and discipline 🧠, which is a true superpower ⚡ in adult life. Instead of taking loans and living under the thumb of debt ⛓️, you rule your money 👑 and can invest in your growth or passions 🚀 without asking anyone for permission.
howToEarnAdvice1: Every time you get any money (from family, helping a neighbor, or allowance), immediately put a set amount (e.g., every $5 or 20%) into a jar that you don't open. The rest is yours to spend. If you don't do it right away, the money will just 'disappear' on small things! 💸
howToEarnAdvice2: Before buying something on impulse, put it back on the shelf and go home. Give yourself two days. If you're still thinking about it after 48 hours and feel it's necessary – go back and buy it. You'll be surprised how often the urge completely disappears once you're home! 🧠
howToEarnAdvice3: Empty your pockets of small coins every evening (e.g., all $1 or $2 coins). Drop them into a container that's hard to open. It might seem like a small amount, but after a month, you'll have enough for pizza or a movie without even feeling like you were saving! 📈
howToEarnAdvice4: This is the easiest way to get real cash. Instead of buying drinks and snacks at the school cafeteria every day, make sandwiches at home and bring a reusable water bottle. Put the money you 'would have spent' straight into your savings. It's pure profit every day! 🍔➡️💰
howToEarnAdvice5: Draw a 'goal thermometer' or a progress bar on a piece of paper (e.g., 'New Headphones') and hang it above your desk. Every time you add to your savings, color in a part of the bar. Seeing yourself get physically closer to your goal is a huge boost and stops you from wasting money! 🏁✨
someAdvicesBelow: 💡 Check out these 5 pro-tips below to help you save for your dreams! 👇✨
pennyTip: 💡 Remember: take care of the pennies, and the pounds will take care of themselves! 💰
